description: Fix harness-audit to load long-term memory from memory/MEMORY.md and guard the path with an eval probe.

userStories.title: Correct harness-audit memory reference
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I need /harness-audit to read the actual long-term memory file so research-mode autopilot selections include durable lessons.
acceptanceCriteria: Other long-term-memory references in the harness-audit skill use memory/MEMORY.md where they point at the canonical file.
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-06-15; harness-audit now points at memory/MEMORY.md.

userStories.title: Guard the memory path with an eval probe
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I need a deterministic guard so stale root-memory references cannot silently return.
acceptanceCriteria: evals/probes/harness-audit-memory-path.sh fails if the harness-audit skill references root MEMORY.md instead of memory/MEMORY.md.
The probe passes after the fix.
CHANGELOG.md records the user-visible harness-infra correction under ## [Unreleased].
